calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Val D. Hornstein, Esq. 415-454-1490 x700 of Hornstein Law for Petitioner.
Philip McLeod, Esq. 415-398-6000 of Keesal Young & Logan for Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court announces the tentative ruling to grant Petitioner's Petition to vacate arbitration award and to deny as to the disqualification of Atty. Lampart. The Court also raises several concerns re: ex parte communication, failure of arbitrator to make required disclosures and the lack of a complete record. Defendant argues and cites cases. Petitioner argues, requests judicial notice and has evidentiary objections.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes)The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER MARY MILLMAN's Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award and Disqualification of Attorney Abe Lampart.

Taken Under Submission.(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/SRB)
